retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds (it either decrements or frees the object); there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper that decrements the reference count of a cxgbi_sock via kref_put and frees the socket when the count reaches zero (via cxgbi_sock_free). The caller must pair each put with a prior get or initial reference (e.g., from allocation). After calling this function, the caller must not access the socket object again, as it may have been freed. The debug logging is incidental; the entire purpose is reference count management. No return value is provided, so callers need not check for success—the operation is always safe to call as long as the reference count is valid.
